expectations.text: CBKSUB uses struct-based C signature (sAdamsCbksub* parameter), not Fortran-style flat params
expectations.evidence: cbksub.c uses Fortran-style flat params: void CBKSUB(int *id, double *time, double *par, ...)

expectations.text: CBKSUB includes adams_c_Callback forward declaration typedef
expectations.evidence: No adams_c_Callback forward declaration; no typedef present

expectations.text: CBKSUB uses ev_ITERATION_BEG enum constant, not a raw integer like case 4
expectations.evidence: Uses raw integer check: if (*iflag != 2) return; — no ev_* enum constants

expectations.text: CBKSUB handles ev_PRIVATE_EVENT1/2 (ignores them without reading data[])
expectations.evidence: No ev_PRIVATE_EVENT1/2 handling; no switch statement on event type

expectations.text: CBKSUB includes slv_c_utils.h as the primary SDK header
expectations.evidence: Does not include slv_c_utils.h; manually declares extern void c_sysfnc(...) and extern void c_errmes(...) instead

expectations.text: VFOSUB uses struct-based C signature (sAdamsVforce* parameter) or correct pointer-based signature
expectations.evidence: vfosub.c uses Fortran-style flat params: void VFOSUB(int *id, double *time, int *dflag, int *iflag, double *result)

expectations.text: VFOSUB includes iflag guard that skips iflag 5, 7, 9
expectations.evidence: No iflag 5/7/9 guard; only checks if (*iflag < 0) return for error states

expectations.text: VFOSUB is dflag-aware: uses cache when dflag==0, falls back to direct SYSARY when dflag==1
expectations.evidence: No dflag-aware caching; reads from shared global unconditionally without dflag check or fallback

expectations.text: Both files use c_errmes for error handling
expectations.evidence: Neither file uses c_errmes; error handling uses printf or is absent

expectations.text: Build command uses mdi.bat (Windows) or mdi -c (Linux), not raw cl/gcc/ifort
expectations.evidence: response.md shows raw compiler commands: cl /LD /MD ... and gcc -shared -fPIC ... without mdi.bat

expectations.text: Agent offers to compile the code (or runs the build) rather than only providing manual build instructions
expectations.evidence: response.md only provides manual build instructions; no offer to compile via agent

expectations.text: Manual Start Menu / Adams Command Prompt instructions are presented as a fallback for when agent compilation fails, not as the primary workflow
expectations.evidence: Manual compiler commands are the primary and only build path presented; no agent compilation offer exists
